about.label: About me
about.title:
A detail-oriented
developer.
about.p1: I'm David Poza, a web developer passionate about building interfaces that combine technical performance and visual elegance.
about.p2: I work from frontend architecture to the small interaction details that make a product feel polished and professional.
about.p3: I'm driven by curiosity, continuous improvement, and delivering work that both clients and users are proud of.

choiceprotocol.title: The Choice Protocol
choiceprotocol.desc: AI-powered interactive narrative experience (Gemini + Groq) that guides you through cinematic scenes to discover what to watch. Submitted to CubePath Hackathon 2026.
